title: test: simplify cleanup code
body:
do not try to first stop and then rm but combine the two operations in
a single command.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

<!--

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name.  Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

comments.body:
LGTM
Not sure why this is a WIP?

> LGTM Not sure why this is a WIP?

I am still playing with it.  I need to check whether it is worth and if there is anything more I can change
Couldn't we just call `podman system reset -f`?

> Couldn't we just call `podman system reset -f`?

let's try that!

> Couldn't we just call `podman system reset -f`?

unfortunately it doesn't work as expected and the tests timeout.

I've reverted to the previous version.  Integration tests take 5-10% less time

LGTM
I restarted the one red test, looked to be a network flake.

/hold cancel

Really cool idea to tackle _that_ part of the tests.  Since cleanup is faster now, I wonder whether the setup could also be improved.
